creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 244919
Patch for webp

Update (lib)webp to 1.3.2 and switch to CMake for faster builds and .cmake files for other projects

Import following patches from Fedora:
https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/libwebp/blob/rawhide/f/libwebp-cmakedir.patch
https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/libwebp/blob/rawhide/f/libwebp-freeglut.patch
https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/libwebp/blob/rawhide/f/libwebp-rpath.patch

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 12.4-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following consumers in 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) using Poudriere:
